title: Ubiquiti ENVR-Core, Enterprise Network Video Recorder Core
category: Cameras, security / IP NVR Recorders / UniFi Video
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative The powerful UniFi Protect network recorder Ubiquiti ENVR-Core, featuring a 3U chassis, (16) bays for 2.5"/3.5" HDDs/SSDs and the option to connect external storage via (2) 24G SFP-8644 (Mini-SAS HD) ports, with support for RAID 5/6/10 allows you to connect up to 300 cameras in 4K (8MP) resolution , up to 400 cameras in 2K (4MP) or up to 500 cameras in FullHD (2MP) . It is equipped with a 128-core ARM processor , 64GB RAM and a pair of hot-swap power supplies, each rated at 550W. Up to 313W is… Device 19" rack rails Rail mounting kit UACC-3U-Bezel-Lite front panel (2) Power cables
